recommended_treatments: Abhyanga (Warm Sesame Oil Massage) before sleeping
Pranayama (Nadi Shodhana / Alternate Nostril Breathing) for 10 minutes daily
Consuming warm Ashwagandha milk at night
recommended_lifestyle_changes: Maintain a consistent sleep-wake schedule (sleeping by 10:00 PM)
Avoid dry, cold, or raw foods; prefer warm, soupy, and cooked meals
Minimize multitasking and practice mindfulness meditation
Ensure adequate hydration with warm water throughout the day

recommended_treatments: Sheetali Pranayama (Cooling breath technique) for 5-10 minutes
Application of pure coconut oil to soothe skin irritation
Gentle cooling Yoga postures like Child's Pose and Moon Salutation
recommended_lifestyle_changes: Avoid sour, fermented, highly spicy, and deep-fried foods
Spend time near natural water bodies or lush green environments during cool hours
Ensure regular meal timings to avoid digestive acidity spikes
Avoid direct sun exposure during peak hours (11:00 AM - 3:00 PM)

Kapalabhati Pranayama (Shining skull breath) for 5 minutes daily
Dry powder massage (Udvartana) to stimulate lymphatic flow
Active Yoga practice like Sun Salutations (Surya Namaskar) at a moderate pace

Prefer light, warm, dry, and easily digestible foods over heavy, oily, and sweet dishes
Incorporate stimulating spices like ginger, black pepper, and turmeric into your diet

Consuming warm herbal teas brewed with ginger, Tulsi, and cardamom
